ddls:
CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the election */,
  "state_code" INTEGER /* ICPSR state code */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* State name */,
  "vep_total_ballots_counted" TEXT /* Total ballots counted for voting-eligible population */,
  "vep_highest_office" REAL /* Highest office voting-eligible population percentage */,
  "vap_highest_office" REAL /* Highest office voting-age population percentage */,
  "total_ballots_counted" INTEGER /* Total ballots counted */,
  "highest_office" INTEGER /* Highest office */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of election (e.g., presidential, congressional) */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date of the election */,
  "turnout_percentage" REAL /* Turnout percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_elections_state_code FOREIGN KEY ("state_code") REFERENCES states ("state_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* State name */,
  "state_abv" TEXT /* State abbreviation */,
  "population" INTEGER /* State population */,
  "region" TEXT /* State region */,
  "division" TEXT /* State division */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voting_eligible_population" (
  "vep_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voting-eligible population record */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election the record belongs to */,
  "vep_total" INTEGER /* Total voting-eligible population */,
  "vep_highest_office_percentage" REAL /* Highest office voting-eligible population percentage */,
  "citizen_population" INTEGER /* Citizen population */,
  "non_citizen_population" INTEGER /* Non-citizen population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vep_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voting_eligible_population_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voting_age_population" (
  "vap_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voting-age population record */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election the record belongs to */,
  "vap_total" INTEGER /* Total voting-age population */,
  "vap_highest_office_percentage" REAL /* Highest office voting-age population percentage */,
  "white_population" INTEGER /* White population */,
  "black_population" INTEGER /* Black population */,
  "asian_population" INTEGER /* Asian population */,
  "hispanic_population" INTEGER /* Hispanic population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vap_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voting_age_population_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ineligibility_rates" (
  "ineligibility_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ineligibility rate record */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election the record belongs to */,
  "prison_population" INTEGER /* Prison population */,
  "probation_population" INTEGER /* Probation population */,
  "parole_population" INTEGER /* Parole population */,
  "total_ineligible_felons" INTEGER /* Total ineligible felons */,
  "ineligibility_rate" REAL /* Ineligibility rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ineligibility_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ineligibility_rates_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prison_population" (
  "prison_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prison population record */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election the record belongs to */,
  "prison_population" INTEGER /* Prison population */,
  "percentage_of_total" REAL /* Percentage of total population */,
  "prison_type" TEXT /* Type of prison (e.g., state, federal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prison_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prison_population_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "probation_population" (
  "probation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each probation population record */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election the record belongs to */,
  "probation_population" INTEGER /* Probation population */,
  "percentage_of_total" REAL /* Percentage of total population */,
  "probation_type" TEXT /* Type of probation (e.g., adult, juvenile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("probation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_probation_population_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parole_population" (
  "parole_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parole population record */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election the record belongs to */,
  "parole_population" INTEGER /* Parole population */,
  "percentage_of_total" REAL /* Percentage of total population */,
  "parole_type" TEXT /* Type of parole (e.g., supervised, unsupervised) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parole_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parole_population_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "total_ineligible_felons" (
  "total_ineligible_felons_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each total ineligible felons record */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election the record belongs to */,
  "total_ineligible_felons" INTEGER /* Total ineligible felons */,
  "percentage_of_total" REAL /* Percentage of total population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("total_ineligible_felons_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_total_ineligible_felons_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the data */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election the user accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method of access (e.g., login, API) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_exports" (
  "data_export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data export record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who exported the data */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election the user exported */,
  "export_time" TEXT /* Time of export */,
  "export_format" TEXT /* Format of the exported data */,
  "export_size" INTEGER /* Size of the exported data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_imports" (
  "data_import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data import record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who imported the data */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election the user imported */,
  "import_time" TEXT /* Time of import */,
  "import_format" TEXT /* Format of the imported data */,
  "import_size" INTEGER /* Size of the imported data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_officials" (
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election official */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election the official belongs to */,
  "official_name" TEXT /* Name of the election official */,
  "official_title" TEXT /* Title of the election official */,
  "official_party" TEXT /* Party of the election official */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_officials_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voter_registration" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voter registration record */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election the record belongs to */,
  "voter_name" TEXT /* Name of the voter */,
  "voter_party" TEXT /* Party of the voter */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date of registration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_registration_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voter_turnout" (
  "turnout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voter turnout record */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election the record belongs to */,
  "voter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the voter */,
  "turnout_status" TEXT /* Status of voter turnout (e.g., voted, did not vote) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("turnout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_turnout_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_turnout_voter_id FOREIGN KEY ("voter_id") REFERENCES voter_registration ("registration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election issue */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election the issue belongs to */,
  "issue_name" TEXT /* Name of the election issue */,
  "issue_description" TEXT /* Description of the election issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_issues_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)
